nasb.text: But God remembered Noah and all the beasts and all the cattle that were with him in the ark; and God caused a wind to pass over the earth, and the water subsided.

esv.text: But God remembered Noah and all the beasts and all the livestock that were with him in the ark. And God made a wind blow over the earth, and the waters subsided.

cnv.text: 神顧念挪亞和所有與他一同在方舟裡的走獸和牲畜；　神使風吹過大地，水就漸漸退了。

ccb.text: 上帝眷顾挪亚及方舟里的野兽和牲畜，使风吹在大地上，水便开始消退。

csbs.text: 神记念挪亚以及与他一起在方舟里的所有活物和牲畜。神使风吹过大地，水就开始退落。
